prompt: Project the disco-ball’s specular-highlight map onto the letter surfaces, adding moving glints and tiny lens-flare spots
prompt_refined: Edit image 1. Apply the luminous, multi-colored specular highlights and light patterns, characteristic of the disco ball in image 2, onto the white 'DISCO NIGHT' text at the top of image 1. The letters should display a dynamic appearance with moving glints and tiny, subtle lens-flare spots across their surfaces.
objects: "DISCO NIGHT" text with luminous, multi-colored specular highlights
"DISCO NIGHT" text with dynamic moving glints
"DISCO NIGHT" text with tiny, subtle lens-flare spots
Event details text (e.g., "STARTS AT 6PM - LIVE - FOOD & DRINKS")
